allow_instructions: Read-only git inspection in this repo (status, diff, log, branch).
Local dev: npm run dev, npm run build, npm run test:unit, npm run lint.
Unit tests via node --import tsx --test under lib/.
Prisma generate and local migrate dev for schema work.
block_instructions: git push --force, git reset --hard, git clean -fd.
npm run db:migrate:deploy:production or production database changes.
Reading or committing .env, .env.local, or credential files.
